prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Whipple W175ax Gen 5 (2.9L) supercharger kit for the 6.2L HEMI SRT Hellcat (engine code: *6.2L Supercharged HEMI V8 - ESF*) with a custom billet aluminum pulley system (ATI Super Damper + 2.5" overdrive pulley) to push boost levels from 11.6 psi to 18 psi, paired with a Kenne Bell Boost-a-Pump to maintain fuel pressure at 85 psi under full load. Requires a DiabloSport Trinity 2 EX with a custom Hellcat TRX-specific tune (93 octane minimum) to manage AFR targets at 11.8:1 and ignition timing at 22° BTDC for optimal power delivery (estimated 1,050+ WHP on E85).

Full exhaust system replacement with a custom 3.5" stainless steel setup from Burns Stainless (header-back), featuring 4-2-1 merge collectors, 304-grade stainless steel tubing, and dual 5" carbon fiber tips (MagnaFlow 10416 mufflers for aggressive but street-legal sound). Includes a custom X-pipe with Vibrant 1799 resonators to eliminate drone while maintaining a deep, guttural tone at 3,500+ RPM. Requires a custom ECU flash to adjust backpressure parameters for optimal scavenging.

Suspension overhaul with a full Öhlins Road & Track DFV kit (TRX-specific valving) paired with Eibach Pro-Truck ERS coilovers (2.5" lift, adjustable damping) and Hellwig 7718 anti-sway bars (front: 1.5" diameter, rear: 1.25" diameter) to reduce body roll during high-speed desert runs. Includes custom polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension 9.5111G) for the control arms and a BDS Suspension 4-link rear setup with adjustable panhard bar for improved articulation and stability off-road. Requires a custom alignment (caster: +4.5°, camber: -1.2°, toe: 0.1°) for optimal tire wear and cornering grip.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny V3 TRX-specific kit (Pandem Design), featuring 3-piece overfenders (carbon fiber construction), custom front splitter with integrated air curtains, and a rear diffuser with dual exhaust cutouts. Includes a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF hood with functional heat extractor vents) and a TRX-specific ducktail spoiler (RK Sport) for improved high-speed stability. Painted in a custom matte Hyper Black (PPG D8186) with gloss black accents on the fenders and rocker panels.

Wheel setup with custom HRE FF17 flow-formed wheels (22x12 +18 front, 22x14 +50 rear) wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler 35x12.50R22LT (front) and 37x13.50R22LT (rear) tires for aggressive stance and off-road capability. Includes a custom wheel spacer kit (Hubcentric 1.25" spacers) to achieve a flush fitment with the Rocket Bunny fenders. Finished with black anodized HRE center caps and custom TRX-logo engraved lug nuts (McGard 24457).

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door panels (EuroCompulsion custom stitching), paired with Recaro Pole Position seats (TRX-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in black Alcantara with red contrast stitching. Includes a custom roll cage (Autopower Industries 4-point bolt-in cage with harness bar) wrapped in red Alcantara, a custom Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede grip), and a TRX-specific gauge pod (AEM 30-0300 X-Series wideband AFR gauge + boost gauge) mounted on the A-pillar. Finished with a custom LED lighting kit (Diode Dynamics interior RGB kit) and a custom TRX-logo embroidered floor mats (WeatherTech with red stitching).
